'''AP Micromine''' was a variety of [[Mine/Legends|mine]] used by the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Darman Skirata]] during his mission on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''
